title: RU Enchantments Encore
description:
Перевод мода Enchantments Encore на Русский.
Translation of the mod Enchantments Encore to Russian.
body:
RU:

Перевод мода [Enchantments Encore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore) на Русский (Поддерживает мод [Enchantment Lore](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-lore)).

**Установка:**
Скачайте ресурс-пак и перенесите его в папку _resourcepacks_ в вашей установки.

****

EN:

Translation of the mod [Enchantments Encore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore) to Russian (Supports [Enchantment Lore](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-lore) mod).

**Installation:**
Download this resource-pack and put it into the _resourcepacks_ folder in your instance.
